steps.prompt: The time of day has a name. Early in the day, when you wake up, is called morning.
Morning! The sun is low and the sky is bright. It is morning time. Press Wake up!
When the sun is right at the top of the sky, it is called midday.
Midday — the sun is at its highest. That is why lunchtime feels so bright! Press Lunch!
Later, when the sun starts to go down, it is called evening.
Evening — the sky turns orange and the sun gets low. Evening is dinner time. Press Dinner!
When it is dark and the moon is out, it is called night.

steps.feedback: Night time — the moon is out and the stars appear. Morning, midday, evening, night — you know them all!
